name: Set Up Cron Jobs
description: Configure scheduled tasks for your AI assistant — daily summaries, reminders and more

content.body:
OpenClaw's cron system lets your AI assistant execute tasks on schedule without manual triggering. Common use cases include:
- Daily morning news summaries or weather forecasts
- Scheduled email/calendar checks with reports
- Periodic health checks or data backup reminders

**Configuration Field Reference:**
- `enabled` — Whether to enable the cron system
- `maxConcurrentRuns` — Maximum concurrent running tasks
- `retry.maxAttempts` — Maximum retry attempts on task failure
- `retry.retryOn` — Error types that trigger retries (rate_limit / network / timeout etc.)

steps.title: Enable Cron System
steps.description: Go to Config Center → Cron Jobs → Ensure the "Enable Cron Jobs" toggle at the top is turned on.

steps.title: Create a Task
steps.description: Click "Add Cron Job" button. Fill in task name, cron expression (e.g., '0 8 * * *' for daily 8 AM), and the prompt to send. Select target channel and agent.

steps.title: Configure Retry Strategy (Recommended)
steps.description: In the Cron Jobs config area under "Retry", set maxAttempts to 2-3, and retryOn to rate_limit and network. This ensures tasks auto-retry when the AI provider is temporarily unavailable.

steps.title: Configure Failure Alerts (Optional)
steps.description: Enable failureAlert and set after to 2 (alert after 2 consecutive failures). Alert messages will be sent to the specified channel and contact.

steps.title: Save and Verify
steps.description: After saving, you can view the task list and next execution time on the Cron Jobs page. Click a task's "Run Now" button to manually trigger a test run.
